mechanics.arena_response_limit: During an Arena attempt, only 1 Support and 1 Sabotage may resolve.

crowd_disfavor.trigger: Gain when you fail an Arena Challenge.

cards.name: Charity
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin
cards.rules_notes: Each player starts with 7 Charity cards in their deck.

cards.name: Spy
cards.effect_text: When played, choose a faction [Legion, Ludus, Senate], this becomes that faction until discarded.
cards.rules_notes: Each player starts with 3 Spy cards in their deck.

cards.name: Fresh Recruit
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins

cards.name: Vexillary
cards.effect_text: Consult the Augur.

cards.name: Auxiliary
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard. OR destroy this to gain an Imperial Favor.

cards.name: Scout
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. Consult the Augur.

cards.name: Pilum Thrower
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Auxiliary Cohort
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. This card may count as Ludus or Senate this turn.

cards.name: Banner
cards.effect_text: Gain an Imperial Favor.

cards.name: Shield Wall
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Keep one on top and put the other on bottom.

cards.name: Supply Wagon
cards.effect_text: Gain a card from the Gallery costing 4 or less. Then destroy a card in the Gallery and replace it.

cards.name: Centurion
cards.effect_text: Copy the effect of another card in play costing 5 or less.

cards.name: Drill Formation
cards.effect_text: Gain the faction bonus of Ludus, Senate, or Legion this turn.

cards.name: Formation
cards.victory_formula: 1 VP per Legion card in deck
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. This card is worth 1 VP for each Legion card in your deck.

cards.name: Engineer
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Consult the Augur, then you may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Armory
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Destroy a card from the Gallery and replace it.

cards.name: Medicus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Gain an Imperial Favor.

cards.name: Prefect
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Consult the Augur.

cards.name: Praetorian
cards.effect_text: Take an Imperial Favor from the Favor discard pile of your choice.

cards.name: Tribune
cards.effect_text: Copy the effect of any Gallery card costing 6 or less.

cards.name: Encampment
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. When gained, you may destroy up to 2 cards from your hand and/or discard.

cards.name: Veteran
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Put a Legion card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Commander
cards.effect_text: Consult the Augur. 1-3: +2 Coins. 4-9: +3 Coins. 10-12: +4 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Captain
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Gain an Imperial Favor.

cards.name: Unstoppable Legion
cards.effect_text: Copy the effect of any card in play.

cards.name: Siege Master
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Destroy any card from any discard pile.

cards.name: Cavalry
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Draw and play the top card of the Main deck. Destroy it at end of turn.

cards.name: Senator
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins.

cards.name: Clerk
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Intel Network
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Look at the top 2 cards of any deck. Keep 1 on top and place 1 on bottom.

cards.name: Tribune
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. If you already played 2 Senate cards this turn, you may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Fair Trade
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Alliance
cards.effect_text: Gain a card from the Gallery costing 4 or less.

cards.name: Bribery
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR discard this during an Arena attempt to apply -1 Valor as Sabotage.

cards.name: Decree
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may destroy a card in the Gallery and replace it.

cards.name: Praetor
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Proclamation
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may place a destroyed card onto the Main deck.

cards.name: Patron
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR gain an Item card costing 4 or less from the Gallery.

cards.name: Vote of Censure
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may destroy a card in the Gallery and replace it.

cards.name: Principate
cards.victory_formula: 1 VP per Senate card in deck
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. This card is worth 1 VP for each Senate card in your deck.

cards.name: Orator
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins OR +3 Coins if you already played a Senate card this turn.

cards.name: Envoy
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. The next card you gain this turn goes into your hand.

cards.name: Statesman
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Shuffle up to 2 cards costing 4 or less from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: Noblewoman of Influence
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Put an Item from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Advisor
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR during an Arena attempt, play this as Sabotage: -2 Valor.

cards.name: Mentorship
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may put a Senate card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Treasury Official
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins.

cards.name: Consul
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins.

cards.name: Tax Collector
cards.effect_text: Destroy a card from your hand or discard to gain +3 Coins.

cards.name: Manipulator
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Look at an opponent's hand and force them to discard 1 card.

cards.name: High Consul
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Discard up to 3 cards in the Gallery and replace them.

cards.name: Voice of Rome
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Reveal the top card of each player's deck. For each revealed card, discard it or return it.

cards.name: Secutor
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Cestus
cards.effect_text: Draw 1 card, then destroy a card in the Gallery and replace it.

cards.name: Retiarius
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Reveal the top card of your deck. You may discard it.

cards.name: Hoplomachus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one on top and one on bottom.

cards.name: Gladiatrix
cards.effect_text: Draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card from your hand.

cards.name: Ex-Soldier
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Savage
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Destroy a card in the Gallery and replace it.

cards.name: Dimachaerus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR if this is the first card you played this turn, discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

cards.name: Murmillo
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Armorer
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may destroy a card in the Gallery and replace it.

cards.name: Brute
cards.effect_text: Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Bestiarii
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may place a Ludus card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Praeco
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Destroy up to 3 cards in the Gallery and replace them.

cards.name: Medicus
cards.effect_text: Draw 1 card. Then gain an Item card costing 5 or less from the Gallery for free.

cards.name: Doctore
cards.effect_text: Draw 3 cards, then discard 1 card from your hand.

cards.name: Pompa
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Epics cost 1 less this turn.

cards.name: Spectators
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Flip up to 2 cards in the Gallery face down. They cannot be targeted or purchased until your next turn.

cards.name: Victory Celebration
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. When gained, shuffle up to 2 cards from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: Veteran
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Draw 1 card. You may discard the drawn card to draw a replacement.

cards.name: Rudiarii
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Put a Ludus card from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Champion
cards.effect_text: Gain a card costing 5 or less from the Gallery for free.

cards.name: Executioner
cards.effect_text: During an Arena attempt, you may play this to cancel 1 Sabotage.

cards.name: Lanista
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard. If you do, gain a card costing up to 1 more than the destroyed card.

cards.name: Magnus
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. You may purchase a card from the destroyed pile this turn.

cards.name: Legendary Gladiator
cards.victory_formula: 1 VP per Ludus card in deck
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. This card is worth 1 VP for each Ludus card in your deck.

cards.name: Rome
cards.effect_text: +5 Coins. Each player with fewer than 3 Crowd Disfavor draws 1 card.

cards.name: The Forum
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. The next card you gain this turn goes into your hand.

cards.name: Julius Caesar
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Gain the faction bonus of Ludus, Senate, or Legion this turn.

cards.name: The Colosseum
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. If you defeat the Arena this turn, gain +2 VP.

cards.name: Crixus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. During an Arena attempt, this contributes +2 additional Valor.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. You may buy an additional card this turn.

cards.name: Flamma
cards.effect_text: Draw 2 cards. If you have a Crowd Disfavor in your discard pile, you may destroy one.

cards.name: Germanicus
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Gain an Imperial Favor.

cards.name: Marcus Crassus
cards.effect_text: +5 Coins. You may gain an Item costing 5 or less from the Gallery.

cards.name: Preparation
cards.effect_text: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put them back in any order, then draw 1 card.

cards.name: Spartacus
cards.effect_text: Draw 2 cards. You may destroy a Crowd Disfavor from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Mark Antony
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Scipio Africanus
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Cancel 1 Sabotage played against your Arena attempt this turn.

cards.name: Pompey the Great
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Destroy a card in the Gallery and replace it. You may buy the replacement this turn.

cards.name: The Republic
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. All Epics cost 1 less this turn.

cards.name: Vestal Priestess
cards.effect_text: Gain 1 Flavor card. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Oenomaus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Put a Ludus, Legion, or Senate card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Constantine
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Copy the effect of any non-Epic card in play.
